title: bromus tectorum var. genuinus
intro: Bromus tectorum var. genuinus, also known as Cheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus tectorum var. genuinus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
